microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **resilience validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing partner-facing workflows to sustain 45+ annual drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring deep IT architecture and security expertise.
Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly enabling broader partner enablement at scale.

Conducted solution discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a prioritized roadmap to automate critical paths and align Esri-style business value framing to technical delivery.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to pinpoint automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments — mirroring BI and analytics platform integration patterns.

Drove alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and demonstrating cloud-infrastructure integration expertise relevant to ArcGIS deployment environments.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing developer intake and modeling the partner enablement and solution-support rigor Esri's GIS ecosystem demands.
